'''''Fuzzy as an Ewok''''' was a touch and smell book for young readers published the same time as ''[[Shiny as a Droid: Things to See, Touch, and Smell from a Galaxy Far, Far Away|Shiny as a Droid]]''. According to [[Bantha Tracks 31]], the book allowed very young children to "be able to sniff the Ewoks' '[[Rainbow berry|rainbow berries]].'" It was one of two "Things to See, Touch, and Smell from a Galaxy Far, Far Away" books, the other being ''Shiny as a Droid''.

The story invites the reader to help [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] search for items for the sacred [[Festival of the Wisties]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Now young children can travel to the fantastic forest moon of Endor and scratch and sniff rainbow berries, touch a fuzzy fungus, search for a lantern bird feather—and more—while helping Wicket and his Ewok friends prepare for the Wistie Festival.''

==Plot summary==
The day before the [[Festival of the Wisties]] (another favorite holiday of the Ewoks), Shaman [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] enlists the help of [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] to gather items for the festival. The Ewoks gather [[brillibab tree]] fungus for a bonfire, a [[Lantern bird/Legends|lantern bird]] feather for [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa's]] headdress, a [[gwanda gourd]] for a Wistie Dance rattle, four starchains for decoration, and some ripe [[Rainbow berry|rainbow berries]].

The night of the festival, the Ewoks and Wisties celebrated around a bonfire and enjoyed some [[Wistie Fest pie]]. Chief Chirpa heralded it as "the best Wistie Fest ever!" and thanked Logray, but the wizard passed credit on to the two young Ewoks who had helped him prepare for the festival.
